description: "Autonomous AI agents for coding, research, computer use, and embodied intelligence demonstrating AGI-like capabilities in real-world tasks."

# Agents

> Autonomous AI systems that perceive, reason, and act in the world. These agents represent the closest things we have to AGI-like behavior in narrow domains -- writing code, conducting research, operating computers, and navigating virtual worlds.

![Coding](https://img.shields.io/badge/Coding-green?style=flat-square) ![Research](https://img.shields.io/badge/Research-purple?style=flat-square) ![Computer Use](https://img.shields.io/badge/Computer_Use-blue?style=flat-square) ![Embodied](https://img.shields.io/badge/Embodied-red?style=flat-square) ![Autonomous](https://img.shields.io/badge/Autonomous-orange?style=flat-square)

### Coding & Software Engineering Agents

|Name|Github Stars|Introduction| Notes |
|-|-|-|-|
|[Aider](https://github.com/Aider-AI/aider)|![GitHub Repo stars](https://badgen.net/github/stars/Aider-AI/aider)|Terminal AI pair programmer. Edit entire repos with LLMs.|Works with GPT-4o, Claude, DeepSeek, local models.|
|[SWE-agent](https://github.com/princeton-nlp/SWE-agent)|![GitHub Repo stars](https://badgen.net/github/stars/princeton-nlp/SWE-agent)|LLM agents that fix real GitHub issues via Agent-Computer Interface.|[Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.15232). Princeton NLP.|
|[goose](https://github.com/block/goose)|![GitHub Repo stars](https://badgen.net/github/stars/block/goose)|Rust-based AI agent: install, execute, edit, and test with any LLM.|Supports MCP and ACP protocols. By Block.|
|[Open Interpreter](https://github.com/OpenInterpreter/open-interpreter)|![GitHub Repo stars](https://badgen.net/github/stars/OpenInterpreter/open-interpreter)|Natural language interface to run code locally without restrictions.|Unrestricted local Code Interpreter alternative.|

### Research & Knowledge Agents

|Name|Github Stars|Introduction| Notes |
|-|-|-|-|
|[STORM](https://github.com/stanford-oval/storm)|![GitHub Repo stars](https://badgen.net/github/stars/stanford-oval/storm)|Stanford: writes Wikipedia-quality articles via retrieval and multi-perspective QA.|[Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2402.14207). Knowledge synthesis agent.|
|[AI Scientist](https://github.com/SakanaAI/AI-Scientist)|![GitHub Repo stars](https://badgen.net/github/stars/SakanaAI/AI-Scientist)|Autonomous research: generates ideas, runs experiments, writes papers.|[Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.06292). By Sakana AI.|
|[gpt-researcher](https://github.com/assafelovic/gpt-researcher)|![GitHub Repo stars](https://badgen.net/github/stars/assafelovic/gpt-researcher)|Autonomous agent for online research; searches, reads, synthesizes reports.|-|
|[mem0](https://github.com/mem0ai/mem0)|![GitHub Repo stars](https://badgen.net/github/stars/mem0ai/mem0)|Persistent long-term memory layer for AI agents across sessions.|52k+ stars. Key missing piece between agents and AGI.|

### Computer-Use & Desktop Agents

|Name|Github Stars|Introduction| Notes |
|-|-|-|-|
|[everything-claude-code](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code)|![GitHub Repo stars](https://badgen.net/github/stars/anthropics/claude-code)|Agent harness with skills, memory, and security for AI coding agents.|Cognitive scaffolding for agentic AI.|
|[nanobot](https://github.com/HKUDS/nanobot)|![GitHub Repo stars](https://badgen.net/github/stars/HKUDS/nanobot)|Ultra-lightweight personal AI agent with minimal footprint.|39k+ stars. Edge-AGI deployment.|
|[Screenpipe](https://github.com/screenpipe/screenpipe)|![GitHub Repo stars](https://badgen.net/github/stars/screenpipe/screenpipe)|Observes your screen, builds personal memory, triggers AI actions.|Always-on prototype AGI assistant.|

### Embodied & Simulation Agents

|Name|Github Stars|Introduction| Notes |
|-|-|-|-|
|[generative_agents](https://github.com/joonspk-research/generative_agents)|![GitHub Repo stars](https://badgen.net/github/stars/joonspk-research/generative_agents)|25 AI agents in a simulated town with unique identities and memories.|[Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2304.03442). Stanford & Google.|
|[Voyager](https://github.com/MineDojo/Voyager)|![GitHub Repo stars](https://badgen.net/github/stars/MineDojo/Voyager)|LLM agent plays Minecraft; discovers skills via self-growing code library.|[Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2305.16291). NVIDIA/CMU.|
|[RoboGen](https://github.com/Genesis-Embodied-AI/RoboGen)|![GitHub Repo stars](https://badgen.net/github/stars/Genesis-Embodied-AI/RoboGen)|Auto-generates tasks, environments, and training data using GPT-4.|[Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2311.01455). Self-improving robot curriculum.|
|[ai-town](https://github.com/a16z-infra/ai-town)|![GitHub Repo stars](https://badgen.net/github/stars/a16z-infra/ai-town)|Starter kit for a virtual town where AI characters live and socialize.|-|

### Enterprise & Agentic AI Platforms

> AI agents moving from demos to enterprise production. These platforms enable organizations to deploy autonomous agents into real workflows at scale.

|Name|Introduction| Notes |
|-|-|-|
|[Salesforce Agentforce](https://www.salesforce.com/agentforce/)|AI agents integrated into Salesforce CRM for sales, service, and commerce.|Largest enterprise AI agent deployment. Announced 2024.|
|[Microsoft Copilot Studio](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-copilot/microsoft-copilot-studio)|Low-code platform for custom AI agents across Microsoft 365 and Azure.|Powers enterprise-wide agentic automation.|
|[Zapier AI Agents](https://zapier.com/agents)|No-code AI agents automating cross-app workflows across 7,000+ apps.|Enterprise workflow automation at scale.|
